4 NATURAL COLOURS · INDIANA LIMESTONE

Stone Colours.
Nature's Palette.

Four Indiana Limestone colours — from warm golden buff to deep characterful gray. Every colour available in all veneer types. Request physical samples before you order.

REQUEST SAMPLES VIEW VENEERS

Explore Our Palette

Four Indiana Limestone Colours.

Each colour is a naturally occurring variation in the same geological formation. All are 100% authentic Indiana Limestone, quarried and fabricated to your specification.

Buff Family
#C8A870

Indiana Limestone · Natural Stone

Standard Buff

The quintessential Indiana Limestone colour — the same warm golden-buff stone that built the Empire State Building, the National Cathedral, and the Biltmore Estate. Standard Buff is warm, luminous, and unmistakably classical.

Stone Character

  • — Warm golden-buff tone with natural variation
  • — Highly workable — holds crisp carved detail
  • — Luminous in both sunlight and shade
  • — Weathers beautifully and deepens with age

Best Applications

  • — Columns, pilasters, and architectural millwork
  • — Carved keystones, cartouches, and door surrounds
  • — Exterior facades and cladding
  • — Pavers, pier caps, and garden walls
Pairs with

Cream, white, warm wood tones, charcoal trim, and all natural materials.

● Available in all five veneer types — thin bed and full bed depth
Request a Sample View Products →
Buff Family
#C0B890

Indiana Limestone · Natural Stone

Silver Buff

A luminous blend of warm buff and silver-gray — lighter and brighter than Standard Buff, with a subtle coolness that bridges the buff and gray families. Silver Buff photographs beautifully and adapts across architectural styles from neoclassical to contemporary.

Stone Character

  • — Light warm buff with silver-gray highlights
  • — Bright and luminous in natural light
  • — Cooler undertone than Standard Buff
  • — Exceptional surface consistency across pieces

Best Applications

  • — Residential facades and feature walls
  • — Window and door surrounds
  • — Balusters, balustrades, and sills
  • — Fine detail work — keystones and carved ornaments
Pairs with

Warm white, bronze hardware, sage green landscaping, and natural wood.

● Available in all five veneer types — thin bed and full bed depth
Request a Sample View Products →
Gray Family
#9A9A94

Indiana Limestone · Natural Stone

Standard Gray

A clean, balanced gray that reads as refined in both traditional and contemporary settings. Standard Gray has the cool neutrality to complement glass and steel as naturally as it does brick and timber — the most versatile of the gray family.

Stone Character

  • — Pure cool-neutral gray, balanced and restrained
  • — Excellent contrast against dark or light trim
  • — Strong in both fine detail and large panel applications
  • — Contemporary and transitional versatility

Best Applications

  • — Modern and transitional facades
  • — Commercial and institutional applications
  • — Urban infill and mixed-use projects
  • — Veneers for contemporary cladding
Pairs with

Black trim, charcoal, stainless steel, glass, white concrete, and dark iron hardware.

● Available in all five veneer types — thin bed and full bed depth
Request a Sample View Products →
Gray Family
#7A7A72

Indiana Limestone · Natural Stone

Rustic Gray

The darkest and most characterful of the gray tones — Rustic Gray carries visible natural variation and an aged quality that deepens over time. It is the colour of historic stone quarries, with a richness that draws the eye and a weight that anchors any composition.

Stone Character

  • — Deep warm-gray with earthy brown undertones
  • — Strong natural variation in tone across surface
  • — Aged, character-rich quality from day one
  • — Deepens subtly and gains patina as it weathers

Best Applications

  • — Heritage and rustic architecture
  • — Garden walls, retaining walls, and landscape elements
  • — Feature walls, fireplaces, and interior stone
  • — Veneers for dramatic, high-contrast facades
Pairs with

Warm wood tones, dark iron hardware, slate, terracotta, and deep green plantings.

● Available in all five veneer types — thin bed and full bed depth
Request a Sample View Products →

Veneer Types

Specifications & Options.

Five veneer systems — from lightweight thin-bed to full structural depth. Every type available in all four colours.

Thin Bed · 1¼"

Smooth

No footing required. Installs over existing masonry or new construction.

Heights 4", 8", 12" Length 24" Depth 1¼" Footing Not required
Request a Quote

Thin Bed · ¾"–1¼"

Split Face & Tumbled

Lightweight, fast, and economical. Split face texture or naturally tumbled edges.

Split Face 2¼", 5", 7¾", 10½" Tumbled 2"–12" Depth ¾"–1¼" Length Random
Request a Quote

Full Bed Depth · 4"

Smooth

Precision cut modular units. Same stone as iconic landmark buildings — now for your facade.

Heights 4", 8", 12", 16" Lengths 24" or 36" Depth 4" Footing Required
Request a Quote

Full Bed Depth · 3"–4"

Split Face

The same stone used on landmark buildings across North America, with a rugged split-face texture.

Heights 2¼", 5", 7¾", 10½" Length Random Depth 3"–4" Footing Required
Request a Quote

Full Bed Depth · 3"–5"

Tumbled

Natural patina develops over time. Tumbled edges give an aged, character-rich finish from day one.

Heights 2"–12" Length Varies Depth 3"–5" Footing Required
Request a Quote

Not sure which colour suits your project?

Request a sample pack — we'll send you physical limestone samples in your preferred colours so you can compare them in your actual light conditions.
